---
title: filename-format
description: "Enforce Go source filename format."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Enforce Go source filename format. Strider default: conventional characters.

## Bad

```go
// user.service.go
```

## Good

```go
// user_service.go
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only filename-format`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
